NAVAREA XIX 138/25
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 LAUNCH OPERATION WILL BE CONDUCTED BY ANDOEYA SPACE FROM 181800 TO 190200 UTC OCT 25.
 IN AREAS BOUNDED BY:

 A. 69-00.00N 012-18.00E
 B. 70-17.00N 016-14.00E
 C. 72-20.00N 013-55.00E
 D. 72-06.00N 005-51.00E
 E. 69-17.00N 006-37.00E
 F. 69-00.00N 012-18.00E
  
 ANDOEYA SPACE CAN BE REACHED ON. TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 AND +47 76 14 44 28 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16
 E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO. 
 FOR FURTHER DETAILS SEE NOTICES TO MARINERS 18/2025
